pdg_node.statement: (ecg_cleaned: array-like, rpeaks: array-like, sampling_rate: numeric, window: numeric or tuple, mode: string) -> dict or array
pdg_node.informal_desc: Applies Zhao et al. 2018 method to analyze heart rate variability from ECG signals using windowed processing

declaration.name: zhao2018hrvanalysis
declaration.type_signature: (ecg_cleaned: array-like, rpeaks: array-like, sampling_rate: numeric, window: numeric or tuple, mode: string) -> dict or array
declaration.docstring: Applies Zhao et al. 2018 method to analyze heart rate variability from ECG signals using windowed processing
declaration.conceptual_summary: windowed_inter_event_variability_extractor. Converts a 1D continuous signal and a sequence of discrete event markers into a set of statistical variability features by first computing inter-event temporal intervals, then applying windowed segmentation and extracting distributional moments, frequency-domain characteristics, and entropy measures within each segment. This is a dimensionality-reducing lossy transform from a time-indexed event sequence to a compact feature vector characterizing temporal regularity/irregularity.. Applications: Seismology: Characterize earthquake clustering patterns by analyzing variability in inter-event times between seismic events within moving time windows to distinguish Poissonian from correlated seismicity., Network traffic engineering: Detect congestion, DDoS attacks, or protocol anomalies by computing variability features from packet or connection inter-arrival times over sliding windows., Manufacturing quality control: Monitor machine health by tracking variability in cycle completion intervals or defect occurrence times, flagging increased irregularity as early wear indicators., Neuroscience: Classify neuronal firing patterns (bursting vs. regular spiking) by extracting inter-spike interval variability features from electrophysiology recordings in sliding temporal windows.

pdg_node.statement: (ecg_cleaned: array-like, rpeaks: array-like, sampling_rate: numeric) -> array
pdg_node.informal_desc: Computes averaged QRS complex template by aligning and averaging heartbeat waveforms around R-peaks

declaration.name: averageqrstemplate
declaration.type_signature: (ecg_cleaned: array-like, rpeaks: array-like, sampling_rate: numeric) -> array
declaration.docstring: Computes averaged QRS complex template by aligning and averaging heartbeat waveforms around R-peaks
declaration.conceptual_summary: Landmark-Aligned Ensemble Waveform Averaging. Extracts a prototypical pattern from a repetitive signal by windowing segments around predefined landmarks, aligning them temporally to a common reference frame, and computing the pointwise mean across all instances. This reduces noise and variability to isolate the stable, recurring structure while discarding transient or uncorrelated components.. Applications: Seismology: Generate station-specific earthquake waveform templates by averaging seismic traces aligned to P-wave or S-wave arrival times for matched filter detection, Neuroscience: Construct spike waveform templates for extracellular neural recordings by aligning and averaging action potentials at their peaks for multi-unit spike sorting, Astronomy: Create standard supernova or variable star light curve templates by time-aligning and averaging multiple observations at peak luminosity or phase markers, Industrial vibration analysis: Build reference vibration signatures for rotating machinery by averaging acceleration waveforms aligned to shaft rotation markers for anomaly detection
